creator: edwin@mavetju.org
text:
On Mon, May 14, 2007 at 10:08:07AM +0800, Ying-Chieh Liao wrote:
> --- jsch-0.1.33.patch begins here ---
> -PORTVERSION=	0.1.28
> -CATEGORIES=	net java
> -MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
> -MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}
> +PORTVERSION=	0.1.33
> +CATEGORIES=	security net java
> +MASTER_SITES=	SF

It is doesn't get repocopied, the security and net should be swapped.

Edwin
